basic_details.job_title: SASTRA Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: SASTRA Deemed University has released the official Project Associate I Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the SASTRA Deemed University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with an M.E./ M.Tech. or M.Sc. in Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Chemical Engineering, or related disciplines along with GATE/ NET qualification can apply through email on or before 25 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. or M.Sc. in Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Chemical Engineering, or related disciplines with GATE/NET qualification
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech. or M.Sc. in Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Chemical Engineering, or related disciplines. Candidates must have qualified GATE/NET or any national eligibility test as prescribed under DST norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SASTRA Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SASTRA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SASTRA Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

SASTRA Project Associate I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.E./M.Tech. or M.Sc. in Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Chemical Engineering, or related disciplines. Candidates must have qualified GATE/NET or any national eligibility test as prescribed under DST norms.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
SASTRA Project Associate I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SASTRA Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SASTRA Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SASTRA Project Associate - I position is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech. or M.Sc. degree in relevant fields such as Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Materials Science, Nanotechnology, or Chemical Engineering, and must have qualified GATE/NET.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Online Screening Test followed by an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000 per month, plus an additional 10% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position at SASTRA Deemed University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is SASTRA Deemed University located?
faq.answer: SASTRA Deemed University is located in Tamil Nadu. Specific city details are not provided in the summary, but the state is confirmed.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for the recruitment process?
faq.answer: Key dates include the last date for application on 25th July 2026, an Online Screening Test on 27th July 2026, and an Online Interview on 29th July 2026.
